headerDisplay: Exposes Kidde Smart Smoke + CO Alarms with Ring compatibility (RGCUAR-RW, RGSAR-RW, RGCUDR-RW) to HomeKit. Generate a refresh token with `npx -p homebridge-kidde-ring kidde-ring-auth` (required if your Ring account uses 2FA, which is Ring's default).

refreshToken.title: Ring Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Recommended. Generate with: npx -p homebridge-kidde-ring kidde-ring-auth

email.title: Ring Email
email.description: Only works for Ring accounts without two-factor authentication. Prefer the refresh token.

locationIds.title: Location IDs
locationIds.description: Optional. Restrict to specific Ring location IDs; leave empty for all locations.

refreshIntervalMinutes.title: Fallback Refresh Interval (minutes)
refreshIntervalMinutes.description: State arrives in real time over a push connection; this is only a periodic full-refresh safety net.
